added_examples.title: TestGenEval: A Real World Unit Test Generation and Test Completion Benchmark
added_examples.reason: Benchmark for LLM test generation, evaluates reasoning about execution and correctness.

added_examples.title: Generating CAD Code with Vision-Language Models for 3D Designs
added_examples.reason: Self-refinement method using VLM feedback to verify/correct generated CAD code, aligning with LLM reliability for code correctness.

dropped_examples.reason: Process reward models (PRMs) for LLM reasoning, aligns with verifier-guided decoding and reliability for code correctness.

changed_examples.title: Steering Large Language Models between Code Execution and Textual Reasoning
